subject: docs(review): add comprehensive code review audit for March 2026
body:
Full codebase audit covering dead code, hacks, bad practices,
potential bugs, and architecture concerns. Key findings: dead /src/
directory, untracked setTimeout calls, window.location.reload() overuse,
173 console statements in production, and polling hook without
concurrent execution guard.

Tags: code-review, documentation, tech-debt
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch
